arid mnk tahlil al-mashaa'ir (Sentiment Analysis) mn tgreedat Twitter w dmjh ma'a bayanat mabee'at l-muntaj mu'ayyan. altafaasil: jam' al-bayanat: qom bjma' tgreedat Twitter al-muta'aliqa b-muntaj mu'ayyan (ikhtar muntaj t'arifh jayyidan). yjb an teshmal al-bayanat al-tarikh, al-nas, 'adad al-i'jaabat, w 'adad i'adat al-tgreed. tahlil al-mashaa'ir: estakhdim taqniyat mu'alajat al-lugha al-tabi'iya (NLP) l-tahlil al-mashaa'ir mn al-tgreedat (ijabiya, salbiya, aw muhaida). saff al-tgreedah b-asas nata'ij tahlil al-mashaa'ir. dmjh al-bayanat: qom bjma' bayanat al-mabee'at l-nafs al-muntaj khilal nafs al-fatra al-zamaniya. arbat bayn tahlil al-mashaa'ir l-lyawm al-wahid ma'a bayanat al-mabee'at l-lyawm nafsih. tahlil al-irtibat: qom bi'ijra' tahlil l-irtibat bayn al-mashaa'ir (ijabiya, salbiya, muhaida) w hajm al-mabee'at. haddid ma idha kan hunak ta'thir wadih l-tgreedat 'ala al-mabee'at. taqdim al-nata'ij: qom b-insha' taqrir yahtawi 'ala rasum bayaniya tuwajjih al-'alaqa bayn al-mashaa'ir w al-mabee'at. qdm istinbatatik w tawsiyaatik b-asas al-tahlil.

Fa'ala sabil al-mithal fi 'aam 1872 tahadath "Samuwil Butlar" fi riwayatihi "Iriwhon" 1872 'an al-alaat wal-dawr al-kabir alladhi satl'abuh fi tatwir al-bashariyya wa-naql al-'alam ila al-tatawwur wal-izdihar. Wa 'ala mar al-zaman, kan al-dhaka' al-istina'i hadiran faqat fi al-khayal al-'ilmi, fataarat ma yusallat al-daw' 'ala al-fawa'id al-muhtamala lil-dhaka' al-istina'i 'ala al-bashariyya wa-jwanibih al-insaniyya al-mushriqa, wa tara't ukhra yusallat al-daw' 'ala al-jwanib al-salbiya al-mutawaqqa'a minhu, wa yatimm taswiruh 'ala annahu al-'adu al-sharis lil-bashariyya alladhi ya'tazim ightisab al-hadhara wa-al-saytara 'alayha. Fi 'aam 2018, asbaha al-dhaka' al-istina'i haqiqatan la khayal, wa lam ya'ud yahtal makanan fi 'alam al-thaqafa al-sha'biyya faqat, laqad kanat sanatu 2018 bimasabati al-naqla al-kubra lil-dhaka' al-istina'i, faqad namat hadhihi al-tiknulujiya bishakl kabir 'ala ard al-waqi' hatta asbahat adata ra'isiya tadkhul fi sulb jami' al-qita'at. waddih li hadha al-maqal wa ajibni kayfa tata'amal ma'a hadhihi al-tahaddiyyat: tuwajih taqniyyat al-dhaka' al-istina'i al-yawm 'iddat tahaddiyyat akhlaqiyya, minha: 1. al-tahayuz: yumkin an tatadamman namadhij al-dhaka' al-istina'i tahayuzat mustamadda min al-bayanat al-mustakhdama lil-tadrib, mimma yu'addi ila nata'ij ghayr 'adila. 2. al-khususiyya: jam' al-bayanat al-shakhsiyya wa istikhdamuha fi tatbiqat al-dhaka' al-istina'i yuthir makhaawif bishan khususiyyat al-afrad. 3. al-mas'uliyya: man al-mas'ul 'an al-qararaat allati yattakhidhha al-dhaka' al-istina'i, khassatan fi al-halaat allati tu'addi fiha hadhihi al-qararaat ila adhraar? 4. al-shafafiyya: al-kathir min namadhij al-dhaka' al-istina'i tu'tabar 'sanadiq sawda'', mimma yaj'al min al-sa'b fahm kayfiyyat ittikhadh al-qararaat. 5. al-tawzif: al-awmatah wal-dhaka' al-istina'i qad tu'addi ila faqd al-waza'if, mimma yuthir qadaya hawla i'adat al-tadrib wal-tawzif. 6. al-tala'ub wal-ma'lumat al-mudallila: al-qudra 'ala insha' muhtawa zayif aw mudallil bi-istikhdam al-dhaka' al-istina'i qad tu'addi ila faqd al-thiqa fi al-ma'lumat. 7. al-ta'thir al-ijtima'i: kayfa tu'aththir anzimat al-dhaka' al-istina'i 'ala al-'alaqat al-ijtima'iyya wal-sulukiyyat al-insaniyya?
